title: Rcon Output Newline
description: Fixes rcon output by appending a newline.
body:
Fixes https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-7569 by adding a newline between lines in output.

## Examples

### Without mod:
```
> help
.../give <targets> <item> [<count>]/help [<command>]/item (replace|modify)...
```

### With mod:
```
> help
...
/give <targets> <item> [<count>]
/help [<command>]
/item (replace|modify)
...
```
